chapter_title.en: Excellence of Husain bin Rauh continued

text: وكان أبو القاسم رحمه الله من أعقل الناس عند المخالف والموافق ويستعمل التقية.

en.sayyid-athar-husain-s-h-rizvi: In the view of Sunni and Shia scholars, Abul Qasim Husain bin Rauh was the most intelligent personage of his time, although he acted on dissimulation (Taqayyah).
